Proof B — Job / worker queue

Problem: Parallel workers process jobs. Failures retry and stampede the queue under storms/jumps.

Approach: KERNEL_v1 health layer — shield load when stable, quarantine worst workers, revive when healthy.

BaselineEngineΔ
Mean success0.5100.743 +0.232
Late success0.5760.735 +0.159
p10 floor0.3800.640 +0.260

Verdict: ENGINE HELPS
